seo.title: Ideas Lab - AI-Scored Business Ideas from 9 Sources | Fly Labs
seo.description: Hundreds of real problems scored by AI across 4 frameworks. Filter by source, verdict, industry. Find your next build.

hero.title: The Ideas Lab
hero.liveAnalyticsLong: Live analytics: verdicts, sources, scoring patterns, industry trends

results.noMatch: No ideas match these filters. Try loosening up.
results.tryClearFilter: Try removing {{filter}} to see more ideas.
results.guestBanner: Scores, verdicts, and AI analysis are available for free.

shipped.title: Shipped from the lab
shipped.flybotDesc: AI partner that scores ideas, finds patterns across sources, and answers questions about the lab. Built on Claude.
shipped.flyboardDesc: Whiteboard with 12 templates, 5 grid styles, and clean exports. Powered by Excalidraw.
shipped.garminDesc: Auto-sync Garmin health data to Notion. Born from a community request, now open source.
shipped.blueprintDesc: Full stack breakdown of how this site was built. Open source and free to fork.

howItWorks.title: How it works
howItWorks.description: We pull real problems from {{sourceCount}} sources daily, score each one with 4 questions using the Fly Labs Method, then validate top ideas against real conversations on X and Reddit. Each idea gets a verdict: build it, validate first, or move on.

flybot.hintTitle: Want to dig deeper into an idea?
flybot.hintDescription: Ask FlyBot. It can score your own ideas, search by source or verdict, and spot patterns across hundreds of scored problems.

toast.enterValidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
toast.submitted: Your idea is in the lab.
toast.submittedDesc: We'll score it, give it a verdict, and validate the best ones against real market conversations.
toast.submitFailedDesc: Couldn't send your idea. Please try again.

detail.scorePending: Score pending. New ideas are scored daily.
detail.disclaimer: AI-generated scores and analysis. Always do your own research before building.
detail.scoreCapped: Score capped due to market saturation. Real problem, crowded space.
detail.expertDescription: {{count}} AI perspectives inspired by different business thinkers. These scores are for context only and do not affect the verdict.
detail.validationPendingDesc: Top-scoring ideas are validated daily against real conversations on X and Reddit.
detail.competitorsDesc: Competitors found from real conversations on X and Reddit.
detail.scopeMvp: Ask FlyBot to scope the MVP
detail.needsValidation: This idea has potential but needs validation.
detail.guestTitle: Sign up free to see the full analysis
detail.guestDescription: AI scoring, expert perspectives, and market evidence for every idea.
detail.guestScoreMessage: Score breakdown and expert analysis available after sign up.
detail.guestPainPlaceholder: People are frustrated with existing solutions in this space.
detail.guestGapPlaceholder: Current tools miss key needs that users keep asking for.
detail.guestBuildPlaceholder: A focused solution targeting the underserved segment.
detail.notFoundMessage: This idea doesn't exist or has been removed.
detail.seoFallback: AI-scored idea analysis on Fly Labs
detail.talkToRealPeople: Talk to real people before building.
detail.betterIdeas: There are better ideas in the lab.

modal.step1Subtitle: Describe a real problem someone has.
modal.step3Subtitle: Optional. So we can follow up.
modal.descriptionPlaceholder: Any context that helps: who has this problem, what they do today, why current solutions fall short.
